sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἰάειρος

- Transliteration: Iaeiros

- Phonetic: ee-ah'-i-ros

- Definition: Jairus = "whom God enlightens"

1. a ruler of a synagogue, probably near the western shore of the Sea of Galilee

- Origin: of hebrew origin H2971

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H2971]; Jairus (that is Jair) an Israelite: - Jairus.
